---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 🖥️ Environment

| Item | Value |
|:---|:---|
| **OS** | Windows / macOS / Linux |
| **OS Version** | e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04 |
| **Locsight Version** | e.g. v1.0.0 |
| **VM** | Yes / No (VMware, VirtualBox, etc.) |

## 📝 Additional Context

Any other context about the problem here.
